mode: read-only, db-free, static + dynamic wrapper verification

sc1DeltaFixSummary.whatWasFixed: K22-D added SC1 delta logic to calculateDeltaScore in score.ts. Logic mirrors full score SC1 detection (getBuilding + inferBuilding fallback, same teacher OR shared class, same day + |idx diff|=1, different building).
sc1DeltaFixSummary.beforeK22D: calculateDeltaScore returned 0 for SC1 contribution; full score returned -5 per SC1 trigger. LAHC solver accepted moves that increased cross-building penalty because delta could not see SC1.
sc1DeltaFixSummary.afterK22D: calculateDeltaScore correctly returns ±5 per affected pair (afterPenalty - beforePenalty). K22-C A.2 case moved from KNOWN_FAIL to PASS. K22-A HIGH risk eliminated.

k22CA2Result.fixture: 2 tasks (same teacher, same class, different teachingTaskIds), 2 rooms (A/B), 2 slots at day1/slot1, day1/slot2

results.title: calculateDeltaScore body contains SC1 delta logic (mirror full score)
results.detail: SC1 delta logic present: SOFT_SC1_CROSS_BUILDING constant, same teacher check, shared class check, getBuilding/inferBuilding, day + |idx diff|=1, deltaSoft accumulation.

results.title: full score SC1 detection logic still present and unchanged
results.detail: calculateScoreWithDetails still has SC1 detection: SC1_CROSS_BUILDING_BACK_TO_BACK constant, softScore += SOFT_SC1_CROSS_BUILDING, getBuilding on both rooms, sameTeacher + sharedClass check, q.slot.id <= p.slot.id dedup guard.

results.title: K22-C verify script: A.2 SC1 = PASS, KNOWN_FAIL = 0, FAIL = 0, BLOCKING = NO
results.detail: K22-C verify all green. PASS=17, KNOWN_FAIL=0, FAIL=0, BLOCKING=NO. A.2 SC1 case is now PASS.

results.title: K22-A audit: SC1 delta = true, SC1 full = true, HIGH = 0, BLOCKING = NO
results.detail: K22-A audit all green. HIGH=0, BLOCKING=NO, SC1 fullScore=true, SC1 deltaScore=true.

results.title: penalty constants hardcoded; no hardWeights/softWeights injected
results.detail: All 6 penalty constants still hardcoded at -1000 / -5 / -10 / -1 / -5 / -2. No hardWeights/softWeights fields referenced in score.ts.

results.title: no out-of-scope file modifications (schema/DB/solver/frontend/API/importer/parser/RBAC)
